function: () => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect(); return { panelY: rect.top, panelBottom: rect.bottom, windowHeight: window.innerHeight, scrollY: window.scrollY, panelClasses: panel.className, readoutText: document.getElementById('draw-strength-readout')?.textContent, labelText: document.getElementById('draw-strength-label')?.textContent, ariaNow: panel.getAttribute('aria-valuenow') }; }
